seoTitle: How to Verify Your Coursera Account Step by Step
metaDescription: Verify your Coursera account so you can access accredited courses and certificates, with steps to complete the process and fix common verification issues.
intro: Some Coursera courses and certificates require a verified account before you can fully access them, so it's worth getting this step done early. This walks through accessing your account settings, completing verification, and resolving common issues along the way.

steps.heading: Access your Coursera account settings
steps.body: Sign in and go to the account section where verification options are managed.

steps.heading: Start the verification process
steps.body: Follow the steps Coursera provides to confirm your identity for account verification.

steps.heading: Resolve common verification issues
steps.body: If verification doesn't go through, check that the information you entered matches what Coursera expects.

steps.heading: Confirm your account is verified
steps.body: Once complete, check your account status to make sure verification was successful before enrolling in courses that require it.

faq.question: Why does Coursera require account verification?
faq.answer: Verification helps confirm your identity, which matters for accessing accredited courses or certificates tied to your name.

faq.question: What should I do if verification keeps failing?
faq.answer: Double-check that the details you're submitting are accurate and match your identity information exactly.

faq.question: Do all Coursera courses require verification?
faq.answer: Not necessarily; it's more commonly required for courses or certificates where your verified identity matters for accreditation.

faq.question: Does verification unlock additional features on Coursera?
faq.answer: Yes, a verified account typically opens up full access to your account's features, including course and certificate options.
